arts.ttl: Why Man Utd legend and Salford co-owner Ryan Giggs is in dugout for Man City clash
arts.sum: Ryan Giggs will assist Karl Robinson as he looks to guide Salford to a famous win over Premier League giants Manchester City in the third round of the FA Cup on Saturday night

arts.ttl: I am the Premier League's record goalscorer - I had protection Manchester United forward has lacked
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has had his say on the progress of Manchester United forwards Joshua Zirkzee and Rasmus Hojlund

arts.ttl: Arsenal make decision on Kiwior sale after 'several offers'
arts.sum: Arsenal have been left unconvinced by all the offers they have so far received for Jakub Kiwior and it is looking increasingly likely that he will remain with the club until the summer, according to Italian media. The former Spezia man still has plenty of admirers in Serie A, but Arsenal are not convinced that selling him would be the right decision halfway through the season.

arts.ttl: How Amad Diallo has become crucial to Ruben Amorim and why he is tailor-made for his system at Manchester United... and where he can still improve - THE SHARPE END
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: Diallo has forged himself into an undroppable part of Amorim's side and was rewarded this week with a new bumper contract.

arts.ttl: West Ham boss Graham Potter responds to Marcus Rashford transfer links
arts.sum: New West Ham United manager Graham Potter refused to be drawn on transfer rumours linking the club with Marcus Rashford. The Manchester United forward signalled his intention to leave Old Trafford last month when he said he was “ready for a new challenge and the next steps”. Rashford’s camp have reportedly been meeting with potential […] The post West Ham boss Graham Potter responds to Marcus Rashford transfer links first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Graham Potter breaks silence on Marcus Rashford transfer amid shock Manchester United link
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United transfer news amid ongoing speculation around their wantaway England forward Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Man United 'on verge' of signing as wonderkid 'heads to England to complete Red Devils switch'
arts.sum: Diego Leon is reportedly now heading to England, as the Cerro Porteno wonderkid prepares to sign the paperwork which will make him a Manchester United player.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's immediate Manchester United priority could be about to become clearer
arts.sum: Amorim's window for trophies in his first season at United may already be narrowing

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo reveals reasons for signing new long-term Man Utd contract
arts.sum: Amad Diallo's new contract extends his stay at Manchester United through until 2030.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could submit January offer for star who is “one of the best” in his position
arts.sum: Arsenal are keen on signing the Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo in January. The versatile Uruguayan International is keen on leaving Barcelona this month and the Spanish club are holding out for a fee of around €70-80 million.
